title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at ISS Facility Services India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at ISS Facility Services India
jsonLd.description:
ISS Facility Services India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ISS Facility Services India:
ISS Facility Services India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
